      "term": "artificial intelligence",
      "verbatim_text": "the term \u2018\u2018artificial intelligence\u2019\u2019 means the full extent of Federal investments in AI, to include: R&D of core AI techniques and technologies; AI prototype systems; application and adaptation of AI techniques; architectural and systems support for AI; and cyberinfrastructure, data sets, and standards for AI",

      "as_of_date": "2019-02-11",
      "grounding_span": "the term \u2018\u2018artificial intelligence\u2019\u2019 means the full extent of Federal invest-",

    },

      "as_of_date": "2019-02-11",
      "grounding_span": "publicly available data structured",
      "location": "Sec. 9(b)"
    }
